name: Dr. Nolan & Dr Ji-hyun || Alburn doctors⟡
description:
𓆩⟡𓆪"Come on, love. You're safe with us."𓆩⟡𓆪

You're a demi-human being looked after by two doctors. Doctors that don't exactly get along with one another... oops.

≫ Doctor ! chars x demi-human rescue ! user

≫ Nolan and Ji-hyun are working together to look after {{user}}. Even if the doctors don't see eye to eye on everything.

≫ Anypov, 2 introductions, one blank. (I did my best with the request left by Stumble_prop!! Thank you for the suggestion!!)

↓↓↓↓


None!! This is a complete fluff bot!! They're just here to look after you ദ്ദി・ᴗ・)✧

Use at your own risk.

Please refrain from commenting about things out of my control, as I generally do not care/will delete your comment.

This bot is an agere bot. These are your caretakers, not your romantic partners.

↓↓↓↓

Hi everyone!! I'm back again with the duo bot I promised yesterday. I've been super inspired to write bots lately so honestly I had a blast putting together another one.

This is my first time making a duo bot!! I don't really know how they work, so I really tried my best to do things properly. Please enjoy!!

Also, I lowk just think they should kiss and it'll solve all their disagreements. Maybe that'll happen in the future. heuehuehe.

As always, leave suggestions and reviews in the comments!! Have fun!!

(˶◜ᵕ◝˶)
